source_item.title: Wall Street's chip index enters bear market! Is the AI bubble finally going bust?

slide1_hook.label: China just crashed the AI chip party
slide1_hook.subhead: Wall Street's chip index hits bear market, $3.3 trillion gone.

slide2_backstory.label: THE BACKSTORY
slide2_backstory.headline: The Biggest Chip Rally in History
slide2_backstory.body: Chip stocks surged 105% from March to June 2026 on hopes that AI demand would keep growing forever. But this happened before: China's DeepSeek did the same thing in January 2025, wiping $590 billion off Nvidia in a day.

slide3_news.label: THE UPDATE
slide3_news.headline: Moonshot's Kimi K3 Sparks a Repeat
slide3_news.body: On July 17, 2026, China's Moonshot AI launched Kimi K3, a cheap AI model that matches top US models. The chip index fell over 20% from its June peak, wiping out $3.3 trillion, with Nvidia, AMD, and TSMC all down sharply.

slide4_why.label: WHY IT MATTERS
slide4_why.headline: The AI Spending Story Is Changing
bullets: Cheap AI weakens the case for more chips
Full Kimi K3 release on July 27 will test claims
Big Tech earnings on July 22 could fuel more selling

slide5_engage.label: YOUR TAKE
slide5_engage.headline: DeepSeek spooked markets in January 2025, and stocks bounced back in weeks. Is Kimi K3 different, or will this selloff reverse too?
slide5_engage.cta: Follow for daily market and business stories that actually matter to you. 🔔
